节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述:
Provides interfaces to control the read and write of tags that support the NFC-A technology.

This class is inherited from the {@link TagSession} abstract class, and provides methods to create {@code NfcATag} objects and obtain the ATQA and SAK.
Obtains the SAK of an NFC-A tag.
注释信息: @returns { number } Returns the SAK of the NFC-A tag.
节点.return_description: Returns the SAK of the NFC-A tag.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the ATQA of an NFC-A tag.
注释信息: @returns { number[] } Returns the ATQA of the NFC-A tag.
节点.return_description: Returns the ATQA of the NFC-A tag.

节点.功能描述:
Provides interfaces to create an {@code NfcBTag} and perform I/O operations on the tag.

This class inherits from the {@link TagSession} abstract class and provides interfaces to create an {@code NfcBTag} and obtain the tag information.
Obtains the application data of a tag.
注释信息: @returns { number[] } Returns the application data of the tag.
节点.return_description: Returns the application data of the tag.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the protocol information of a tag.
注释信息: @returns { number[] } Returns the protocol information of the tag.
节点.return_description: Returns the protocol information of the tag.

节点.功能描述:
Provides methods for creating an NFC-F tag, obtaining tag information, and controlling tag read and write.

This class inherits from the {@link TagSession} abstract class and provides interfaces to create an {@code NfcFTag} and obtain the tag information.
Obtains the system code from this {@code NfcFTag} instance.
Obtains the PMm (consisting of the IC code and manufacturer parameters) from this {@code NfcFTag} instance.

Provides methods for creating an NFC-V tag, obtaining tag information, and controlling tag read and write.

This class inherits from the {@link TagSession} abstract class and provides interfaces to create an {@code NfcVTag} and obtain the tag information.
Obtains the response flags from this {@code NfcVTag} instance.
Obtains the response flags from this {@code NfcVTag} instance.
Provides methods for accessing IsoDep tag.
Gets IsoDep Historical bytes of the tag, which is based on NfcA RF technology. It could be null if not based on NfcA.
注释信息: @returns { number[] } Returns the Historical bytes, the length could be 0.
节点.return_description: Returns the Historical bytes, the length could be 0.

节点.功能描述: Gets IsoDep HiLayer Response bytes of the tag, which is based on NfcB RF technology. It could be null if not based on NfcB.
注释信息: @returns { number[] } Returns HiLayer Response bytes, the length could be 0.
节点.return_description: Returns HiLayer Response bytes, the length could be 0.

节点.功能描述:

2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.

@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter check failed. Possible causes:

@throws { BusinessError } 3100204 - The tag I/O operation failed.
节点.return_description: Returns true if extended apdu length supported, otherwise false.
